title: Hatarake! - Working Hard! Even though I getting isekai'd!
description:
He gave his life to his job but got nothing in return.

Overworked, exhausted, and forgotten.

His story should have ended on a cold city street.

But a god intervenes.

“All your hard work will be rewarded.”

Reborn in Xelia, a world of magic and monsters, he’s granted a second chance.

To build a new life, and finally fight for his own happiness.

 

Build Your Life From Scratch

Plant and harvest crops, raise livestock, fish in quiet rivers, mine for rare ores, forage in the wild, or take on part-time jobs around town.

Whether you prefer peaceful farm life or chasing profit, there are countless ways to earn a living and grow your dream homestead at your own pace.

Create the Home You Deserve

Turn your hard-earned coin into comfort and style.

Upgrade your farm, decorate your house with furniture, and life a wonderful life.

Life Is More Than Work

Slow down and enjoy the simple joys of village life.

Talk to villager, build friendships, experience heartwarming and hilarious cutscenes, celebrate seasonal festivals, and maybe even find someone special to share your new life with.

Because this time, you’re not just working to survive.

You’re living. 

 

[-]Classic farming games with less stress.

[-]Don't like farming? Don't force yourself! There are plenty of ways to earn coins!

[-]Fight monster in dungeon with Action RPG battle system! (not mandatory)

[-]Explore dungeon, solve (fairly easy) puzzle and claim treasure!

[-]There are different festivals every season so you don't get bored.

[-]Three potential wives you could marry. (who could even have children)

[-]Buy empty land, invite (force) people to join and now your empty land is not so empty anymore!.

[-]No main quest = no restriction! Play however you want.
description_short: Working Hard! Even though I getting isekai'd! is a simulation game similar to the old Harvest Moon/Rune Factory series. Set in Grion, a small village somewhere in Xelia. A fantasy world where magic and monsters are exist.
